title: Testimonial Details

fields.label: Quote
fields.name: quote
fields.instructions: Full testimonial text, migrated verbatim from the live Testimonials page (1062). Multi-paragraph quotes are kept as separate paragraphs, not condensed.

fields.label: Company Logo
fields.name: company_logo
fields.instructions: Return format: ID. All 4 real logos are already uploaded to the Media Library — see migration table for existing attachment IDs (no new uploads needed).

fields.label: Person Name
fields.name: person_name
fields.instructions: The individual who gave the testimonial, e.g. "Shailesh Divani".

fields.label: Person Role
fields.name: person_role
fields.instructions: Job title only, e.g. "Director" — company name is the post title, not repeated here. Migrate from the live page's "{role} · {company}" format, splitting at the middle dot.

fields.label: Person Photo
fields.name: person_photo
fields.instructions: Return format: ID. Optional — only 1 of the 4 real testimonials (Kim Beighton, Harsco Environmental) has a real photo live; the other 3 show a 2-letter initials avatar instead. Leave blank for those 3 rather than inventing or guessing a photo — [iep_testimonial_grid] falls back to rendering initials automatically when this field is empty, exactly matching current live behaviour.

fields.label: Display Order
fields.name: display_order
fields.instructions: Controls presentation order in [iep_testimonial_grid]. Migrate using each testimonial's current position on the live page (1–4, see migration table).

description: CMS-008 deployment package — field model for cspt-testimonial (the site's own admin sidebar already showed a "Testimonials" menu item before this package was built, confirming this CPT exists; the Code Snippet auto-detects and retrofits it if so, or registers it fresh if not — see DECISIONS.md). Post title = company name (matches Case Studies' and Portfolio's precedent of using post title for the primary real-world identifier). No individual detail pages — Mission Control's explicit choice, grid/wall display only.
